creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Sun May 25 12:37:06 2014
New Revision: 355170
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/355170
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r355170/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here,
    - Remove leading indefinite article from COMMENT
    - Reformat pkg-descr
    - Add WWW
  
  PR:		ports/189514
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-TraceFuncs/Makefile
  head/devel/p5-TraceFuncs/pkg-descr

Modified: head/devel/p5-TraceFuncs/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-TraceFuncs/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:37:01 2014	(r355169)
+++ head/devel/p5-TraceFuncs/Makefile	Sun May 25 12:37:06 2014	(r355170)
@@ -9,8 +9,11 @@ MASTER_SITE_SUBDIR=	Devel
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 DISTNAME=	traceFunc-${PORTVERSION}
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
-COMMENT=	A perl5 module to trace function calls as they happen
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
+COMMENT=	Perl5 module to trace function calls as they happen
+
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
 
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	configure

Modified: head/devel/p5-TraceFuncs/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-TraceFuncs/pkg-descr	Sun May 25 12:37:01 2014	(r355169)
+++ head/devel/p5-TraceFuncs/pkg-descr	Sun May 25 12:37:06 2014	(r355170)
@@ -1,17 +1,19 @@
-       Devel::TraceFuncs provides utilities to trace the
-       execution of a program.  It can print traces that look
-       something like:
+Devel::TraceFuncs provides utilities to trace the
+execution of a program.  It can print traces that look
+something like:
 
-          +-> global: '0'
-          |  +-> main::fo(4, 5) (in ./t.pm:32): 'now then'
-          |  |  +-> main::fp(4, 5) (in ./t.pm:19)
-          |  |  |  +-> main::fq() (in ./t.pm:13)
-          |  |  |  |  que pee doll (in ./t.pm:8)
-          |  |  |  +-< main::fq() (in ./t.pm:13)
-          |  |  |  cee dee (in ./t.pm:14)
-          |  |  +-< main::fp(4, 5) (in ./t.pm:19)
-          |  |  ha
-          |  |  hs (in ./t.pm:20)
-          |  +-< main::fo(4, 5) (in ./t.pm:32): 'now then'
-          |  done (in ./t.pm:34)
-          +-< global: '0'
++-> global: '0'
+|  +-> main::fo(4, 5) (in ./t.pm:32): 'now then'
+|  |  +-> main::fp(4, 5) (in ./t.pm:19)
+|  |  |  +-> main::fq() (in ./t.pm:13)
+|  |  |  |  que pee doll (in ./t.pm:8)
+|  |  |  +-< main::fq() (in ./t.pm:13)
+|  |  |  cee dee (in ./t.pm:14)
+|  |  +-< main::fp(4, 5) (in ./t.pm:19)
+|  |  ha
+|  |  hs (in ./t.pm:20)
+|  +-< main::fo(4, 5) (in ./t.pm:32): 'now then'
+|  done (in ./t.pm:34)
++-< global: '0'
+
+WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/traceFunc/
